mapper.insert: INSERT INTO form_data (template_id, version, field_values_json, submitter_id, submitted_at) VALUES (#{templateId}, #{version}, #{fieldValuesJson}, #{submitterId}, #{submittedAt})
mapper.select: SELECT id, template_id, version, field_values_json, submitter_id, submitted_at FROM form_data WHERE id = #{id}
SELECT id, template_id, version, field_values_json, submitter_id, submitted_at FROM form_data WHERE template_id = #{templateId} ORDER BY submitted_at DESC
